sql.where:
Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y'
AND Q.QC_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND Q.QC_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND Q.QC_STATUS = #{status}
AND ( UPPER(Q.QC_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_LOT) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_CONTENT) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_DIRECTOR) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT Q.QC_ID AS qcId, Q.QC_LOT AS qcLot, Q.QC_TYPE AS qcType, Q.QC_CONTENT AS qcContent, Q.QC_QTY AS qcQty, Q.QC_STATUS AS qcStatus, Q.QC_ODATE AS qcOdate, Q.QC_DIRECTOR AS qcDirector, Q.QC_DMSG AS qcDmsg, Q.QC_DATE AS qcDate, Q.QC_WMSG AS qcWmsg, Q.QC_PASS_QTY AS qcPassQty, Q.QC_USAGE AS qcUsage FROM QC Q
ORDER BY Q.QC_ID DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{page.endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{page.startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QC Q
Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y'
AND Q.QC_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND Q.QC_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND Q.QC_STATUS = #{qcStatus}
AND ( UPPER(Q.QC_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_LOT) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_CONTENT) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(Q.QC_DIRECTOR) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
SELECT NVL(SUM(Q.QC_QTY), 0) AS qcQty, NVL(SUM(Q.QC_PASS_QTY), 0) AS qcPassQty FROM QC Q WHERE Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y' AND TRUNC(Q.QC_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT Q.QC_ID AS qcId, Q.QC_LOT AS qcLot, Q.QC_TYPE AS qcType, Q.QC_CONTENT AS qcContent, Q.QC_QTY AS qcQty, Q.QC_STATUS AS qcStatus, Q.QC_ODATE AS qcOdate, Q.QC_DIRECTOR AS qcDirector, Q.QC_DMSG AS qcDmsg, Q.QC_DATE AS qcDate, Q.QC_WMSG AS qcWmsg, Q.QC_PASS_QTY AS qcPassQty, Q.QC_USAGE AS qcUsage FROM QC Q WHERE Q.QC_ID = #{qcId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QC ( QC_ID, QC_LOT, QC_TYPE, QC_CONTENT, QC_QTY, QC_STATUS, QC_ODATE, QC_DIRECTOR, QC_DMSG, QC_DATE, QC_WMSG, QC_PASS_QTY, QC_USAGE ) VALUES ( 'QC' || QC_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{qcLot}, #{qcType}, #{qcContent}, #{qcQty}, #{qcStatus}, SYSDATE, #{qcDirector}, #{qcDmsg}, #{qcDate}, #{qcWmsg}, #{qcPassQty}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE QC SET QC_LOT = #{qcLot}, QC_TYPE = #{qcType}, QC_CONTENT = #{qcContent}, QC_QTY = #{qcQty}, QC_STATUS = #{qcStatus}, QC_DIRECTOR = #{qcDirector}, QC_DMSG = #{qcDmsg}, QC_DATE = #{qcDate}, QC_WMSG = #{qcWmsg}, QC_PASS_QTY = #{qcPassQty} WHERE QC_ID = #{qcId}
